blocks.text: Match preview: Norway face Hungary in 3rd Match (T20) on Wed, 8 Jul, 2026, 7:00 pm at Svanholm Park Brondby. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: ICC Men's T20 World Cup Europe Sub Regional Qualifier B, 2026

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Partly cloudy · High 24°C / Low 13°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 25 km/h. Dry conditions expected — good for batting if the pitch is true.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
